strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems, comfortably exceeding the 15-year requirement
Current AI-relevant work at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks for agentic workflows — directly aligned with the role's AI-powered product focus

Proven entrepreneurial builder: founded and still runs GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and adopted by Green Map, plus a track record of public talks, workshops, and knowledge-sharing
concerns: Recognized AI expertise is recent and emerging rather than a long-established public track record of shipped AI products or platforms
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which the role lists as preferred
Career titles top out at Staff/Senior engineer; director-level strategic influence would be a step up from prior scope

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of engineering experience (15+ years, full stack to systems)
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work with builder/code fluency
Founder experience and public technical evangelism (talks, workshops, open source)

response.justification: The candidate brings the rare combination this role asks for: deep, polyglot engineering experience spanning nearly two decades — from millions-of-requests-per-second low-latency systems at Dunnhumby to cloud-native platforms on AWS and Kubernetes — paired with current, hands-on work building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. As founder of GISCollective he has demonstrated exactly the entrepreneurial, zero-to-one instinct the role prefers, sustaining an open-source platform with real adopters for nearly a decade. His history of creating workshops, conference talks, and courses shows he can inspire and advise others through disruptive technical change, mapping well onto the advisory and thought-leadership responsibilities. He meets the minimum qualifications outright, and his builder-first AI fluency and craftsmanship background make a strong case for advancing him.
